RuleSet.Name: libschema/schema/SchemaTableIndexKey.hpp
RuleSet.Descr: C++18 specification of a $TableName$ $Suffix$ index key object.
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch IsPrimaryIndex yes empty default declFileSchemaTableIndexKeyHpp$

$CPlusDefNamespace$::$DefSchemaName$$popto Table TableName$By$Suffix$Key operator =( $CPlusDefNamespace$::$DefSchemaName$$popto Table TableName$By$Suffix$Key& src ); $CPlusDefNamespace$::$DefSchemaName$$popto Table TableName$By$Suffix$Key operator =( $CPlusDefNamespace$::$DefSchemaName$$popto Table TableName$Buff& src );
$reference Column declIndexKeyColumnGetterSetter$
$iterate Columns( each declColumnGetterSetter )$
$iterate Columns( each declColumnAttr )$
: public $reference DefSchema SchemaName$$TableName$By$Suffix$Key
virtual size_t hashCode() const;
std::string toString();

$declIndexKeyComparisonLessThan$ $declIndexKeyComparisonLessOrEqual$ $declIndexKeyComparisonEqual$ $declIndexKeyComparisonNotEqual$ $declIndexKeyComparisonGreaterOrEqual$ $declIndexKeyComparisonGreaterThan$
bool operator <( const $SchemaName$$TableName$By$Suffix$Key& rhs ); bool operator <( const $SchemaName$$TableName$Buff& rhs );
bool operator <=( const $SchemaName$$TableName$By$Suffix$Key& rhs ); bool operator <=( const $SchemaName$$TableName$Buff& rhs );
bool operator ==( const $SchemaName$$TableName$By$Suffix$Key& rhs ); bool operator ==( const $SchemaName$$TableName$Buff& rhs );
bool operator !=( const $SchemaName$$TableName$By$Suffix$Key& rhs ); bool operator !=( const $SchemaName$$TableName$Buff& rhs );
bool operator >=( const $SchemaName$$TableName$By$Suffix$Key& rhs ); bool operator >=( const $SchemaName$$TableName$Buff& rhs );
bool operator >( const $SchemaName$$TableName$By$Suffix$Key& rhs ); bool operator >( const $SchemaName$$TableName$Buff& rhs );

namespace std { $declStdIndexKeyComparisonLessThan$ $declStdIndexKeyComparisonLessOrEqual$ $declStdIndexKeyComparisonEqual$ $declStdIndexKeyComparisonNotEqual$ $declStdIndexKeyComparisonGreaterOrEqual$ $declStdIndexKeyComparisonGreaterThan$ $implStdIndexKeyHash$ }
